retrieved_result: How big is a hectare? How big is a hectare? Posted on 2007-11-16 by admin One of the least known metric units – and one which journalists and estate agents seem to struggle with – is the hectare (ha). So perhaps it will help to relate this very useful measure to the sizes of sports fields. Article (including diagrams) by
